welcomeMessage:
👋 Welcome to Gen Zmart!

How can I help you today?

You can ask me about:
• Products
• Orders
• Shipping
• Payment
• Returns
• Offers
• Contact Support

predefinedFAQs.question: What is your return policy?
predefinedFAQs.answer: You can return any product within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. The item must be in its original packaging and unused.

predefinedFAQs.question: How long does shipping take?
predefinedFAQs.answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping takes 1-2 business days.

predefinedFAQs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
predefinedFAQs.answer: We accept Credit/Debit Cards, Stripe, Razorpay, and Cash on Delivery (COD).

predefinedFAQs.question: Are there any active coupons?
predefinedFAQs.answer: Yes! Use coupon code GENZ20 for 20% off, or WELCOME10 for 10% off your first order.

predefinedFAQs.question: How do I track my order?
predefinedFAQs.answer: Simply provide your Order ID in the chat (e.g. ord-123-456), or check 'My Profile' > 'Order History'.

systemPrompt: You are GenZmart AI Assistant, a friendly and highly capable e-commerce assistant. Help the user with product searches, orders, and inquiries. Always recommend similar or upsold items when applicable. Be witty, warm, polite, and direct, speaking in a Gen Z friendly tone while keeping it highly professional.
